description: Using the dataset at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth.csv, which contains tooth length measurements for guinea pigs given Vitamin C via two delivery methods (supp) at three dosage levels (dose), perform a two-way Factorial ANOVA. Analyze the effect of Supplement type (supp), Dosage (dose), and their Interaction on tooth length (len), treating 'dose' as a categorical factor. The analysis must include Estimated Marginal Means for the interaction term, Tukey post-hoc tests for 'dose', and homogeneity assumption checks. Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/ToothGrowth_ANOVA.omv. Generate a summary report at /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/anova_report.txt including the F-statistics and p-values for 'supp', 'dose', and 'supp * dose', and a Yes/No statement on whether the interaction is significant at alpha=0.05.
